caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a political event or press conference. The central figure, an older man with white hair and glasses, is seated at a table with microphones in front of him, suggesting he is addressing the media. He is flanked by two other men, one on each side, who are also part of the event. The background features a green banner with text in Bengali, indicating the location might be in West Bengal. The news ticker at the bottom of the screen provides additional context, mentioning "Nitesh Kumar" and expressing gratitude for the Prime Minister's wishes and support. The overall setting suggests a formal political gathering, possibly related to a recent development or announcement involving the Congress party and its leader, Tejashwi. The changing text on the screen indicates different headlines or updates being discussed during the segment.
